enrichment.summary: Kyle films a brief morning vlog before work, talking about his phone storage issues, plans to organize audiobooks, and ongoing projects including a Facebook page, Google Earth mapping of Boulder, and daily vlogging goals.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: amazed by their computer-like capability and large storage
